properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Chaos, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their chaos resistance.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -30% to Chaos Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports non-instant spell skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% increased Cast Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods:
15% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
80% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with an area of effect.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% increased Area of Effect
Supported Skills deal 6% increased Area Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: The Apostate
explicitMods: Gain Maximum Life instead of Maximum Energy Shield from Equipped Armour Items
flavourText: When I finally rejected my faith entirely, my stagnant belief
became thick white blood, as choking as it was nourishing.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Retaliate against a blocked hit with a surge of divine power, causing multiple waves of lightning bursts to expand outward from a targeted location. This skill cannot be Triggered or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Area of Effect
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage

Cannot be used by default
Becomes Usable once for 2 seconds when you Block a Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have +148% to Critical Strike Multiplier
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Chaos Damage
Supported Spells Sacrifice 20% of your current Life when Cast to gain added Chaos Damage equal to 55% of Sacrificed Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText:
Supports skills with cooldowns.
Cannot support triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 2% reduced Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Non-Instant Skills have +1 Cooldown Use
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports retaliation skills.
explicitMods: Supported Retaliation Skills become Usable for 40% longer
Supported Skills have 90% more Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that apply an effect to an area around a targeted location. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 10% increased Area of Effect
Supported Skills have 21% less Area of Effect

Supported Area of Effect Skills also affect areas in front of, behind,
and on each side of the targeted area
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The echoes of lost loved ones surrounded her,
maddeningly close, but forever out of reach.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports banner skills. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Cost Life instead of Mana
Supported Banners inflict Corrupted Blood every second to enemies within their area
Corrupted Blood inflicted by Supported Banners deals 23.6 base Physical Damage per second per Valour consumed
Corrupted Blood inflicted by Supported Banners has a Base Duration of 8 seconds
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The history of Wraeclast is marked by bloody conflicts. The rise
and fall of empires. Man slaughtered man, never suspecting the
madness lurking under the surface might not have been innate."

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: The Dark Seer
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
10% Global chance to Blind Enemies on hit
Enemies Blinded by you have Malediction
flavourText: Feed on the light of the living,
Bring darkness to all I see,
Until we are one in shadow.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 271 to 407 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 13 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 39% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 12.1 Life per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Sacrifice 11% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
6% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life
6% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 6% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 70% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 70% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a crystal that pulses with cold for a duration. Each pulse applies a debuff to nearby enemies for a secondary duration which reduces life regeneration rate, and also inflicts Cold Exposure. When the crystal's duration ends, it explodes, dealing heavy cold damage to enemies around it.
explicitMods: Cold Exposure applies -15% to Cold Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a portal to the current area's town.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

typeLine: Apprentice's Silver Flask of the Cheetah
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Loath Grasp
implicitMods: 20% chance to Extinguish Enemies on Hit

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants bonuses to damage and critical strike chance of spells to you and your allies, and gives a chance to create Consecrated Ground against stronger enemies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Non-Minion Allies have a 10% chance to create Consecrated Ground on Hitting a Rare or Unique Enemy, lasting 8 seconds
You and nearby allies have 40% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance
You and nearby allies deal 16% more Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 20% increased Aura effect

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Killing Blows with Supported Skills cause Enemies to have a 25% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Those citizens of Oriath touched by the
roving storms died most horrible deaths.

name: Atziri's Promise
explicitMods: Gain 6% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 7% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

typeLine: Wide Amethyst Flask of the Opossum
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

typeLine: Ample Quicksilver Flask of Plume Moss
explicitMods: 49% chance to Avoid being Shocked during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

typeLine: Endless Bismuth Flask of the Rainbow
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Sorrow Knot
explicitMods: Adds 1 to 40 Lightning Damage to Attacks

name: Geofri's Baptism
flavourText: "One quick tap is all the persuasion you'll need."
- Archbishop Geofri of Phrecia Cathedral
